description: Sector-specific screening controls for Nigerian sports organizations, clubs, federations, academies, athlete welfare, anti-doping, safeguarding, events, and sports governance documents.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only sector overlay for Sports Sector Compliance Overlay; intended to be applied with nigeria_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Nigerian statutes, regulations, regulator guidance, codes, directives, and sector rules available at rule-pack publication time.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Sports Commission Act / National sports administration framework
primary_sources.issuer: Federal Republic of Nigeria / National Sports Commission

primary_sources.name: Nigeria Anti-Doping Organization rules and resources
National Anti-Doping legal and policy framework
primary_sources.issuer: Federal Republic of Nigeria / sports authorities

primary_sources.name: Nigeria Data Protection Act, 2023 and GAID 2025

rules.title: Sports organization, federation, academy, or event authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for registration, federation affiliation, permit, authorization, or approval evidence for sports operations or events.

metadata.review_note: Automated result is an evidence-based screening signal only and requires qualified human/legal review before reliance.
metadata.evidence_expectation: Rule passes only when the uploaded document or document set contains matching evidence signals; absence or weak evidence should be reviewed by a human reviewer.
